subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved maid servant of God! Thy letter was received. It contained a very good news. Thou didst go to Nice and made the souls thy associates…. After marriage thou shouldst, God willing, together with thy revered husband diffuse the sweet savours of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه شما مژده خوشی داشت بنیس رفته بودی و نفوس را همدم و
subcodes.subjects: @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
